$description: Per-screen handoff spec for "Dashboard" (S1) in flow "xplor-hub-login". Generated by scripts/build-handoff.mjs — do not edit by hand.
name: Dashboard
purpose: Kiosk landing screen: QR sign-in with Xplor Home, email sign-in, or the visitor log.
entry: Every journey starts here (all three bottom launchers land on the Dashboard, behind the launch splash)
exit: → S2 via Sign in with email; → S7 via Visitor log
layout: Hub shell: 4px teal strip · eyebrow 'Little Bugs ELC' · 48px title · account avatar (top right)
Centred panel (max 800px): QR tile (196px, decorative placeholder) + 'Scan with Xplor Home' caption on the left
Right column: two stacked action cards — Sign in with email · Visitor log

copy.text: Sign your name in or out

behaviour: The launch splash overlays this screen for ~950ms on every journey launch, then fades out.
'Sign in with email' opens the sign-in screen (S2) within the current journey (parent/contact or educator).
'Visitor log' switches to the visitor journey and opens the log (S7) — no login required.
The QR tile is decorative in the prototype; real pairing with Xplor Home is out of scope.
a11y: Action cards are real <button type="button"> elements.
The QR image is decorative — mark aria-hidden in build.
Kiosk touch targets: both action cards exceed 48px height.

acceptance.text: Sign in with email opens the sign-in screen.
acceptance.assert: click('Sign in with email') -> step == signin

acceptance.text: Visitor log opens the visitor journey without a login step.
acceptance.assert: click('Visitor log') -> step == visitor AND no credential prompt

acceptance.text: The splash replays on every journey launch and dismisses itself.
acceptance.assert: launch(journey) -> splash visible, auto-dismissed within ~1s; absent with ?bare=1
